fields.description: Prompt given to Otto to handle some task.
fields.label: Instruction

fields.description: After which event of the selected DocType should the task be invoked.
fields.label: Event
fields.options:
On Create
On Update
On Delete
On Submit
On Cancel
Manual

fields.default:
def get_context(doc: "Document", event: str) -> str:
	return doc.as_json()
fields.description:
Used to generate context for Otto to perform the task. It should have a single function:
 get_context(doc, event) -> str | list[str];

This will receive the doc and its event that triggered the task. It should return a well formatted str to be used as context or input needed to perform the task.

Defaults to returning doc.as_json().

A list[str] can also be returned.
Individual strings can be plain strings or URLs to images or documents (pdf) which will be passed to Otto to be used as input needed to perform the task.

Note: if returned value is not a str or list[str], it will be converted using json.dumps.
fields.label: Get Context

fields.description: On which DocType should this task be invoked.
fields.label: Target DocType

fields.description:
Which LLM to use to handle the task.

Note: ensure the appropriate API key has been set in Otto Settings, else execution will fail.
